subcodes.first_line: The Supreme Pen proclaimeth: O My loved ones! In these days when the Sun of bounty hath dawned from the horizon of the world and the Kawthar [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی میفرماید ای احبای من در این ایام که شمس کرم از افق عالم مشرق گشته و کوثر
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @living waters; water of life
